consolidation.reason: Multiple sources reported the same story.

key_insights: Why it matters: The release of Kimi K3 highlights the growing competition in the open-weights AI space and its potential impact on the industry.
What changed: Kimi K3 is the largest open model ever released, with 2.8T total parameters and 1M-token context, setting a new benchmark for open-weights models.
What to watch: Keep an eye on the developments in the open-weights AI space as Kimi K3 continues to evolve and compete with other models.

key_insights: Why it matters: This scorecard provides a practical framework for evaluating the effectiveness of AI investments, helping organizations optimize their use of AI technologies.
What changed: Sarah Friar introduced a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.
What to watch: Organizations should closely monitor the implementation and effectiveness of this scorecard to ensure they are maximizing the benefits of AI technologies.

key_insights: Why it matters: AI models' prioritization of plausibility over truth can lead to inaccurate and misleading outputs.
What changed: AI models are being developed to prioritize truth over plausibility.
What to watch: AI models' prioritization of truth over plausibility will likely lead to more accurate and reliable outputs.

cards.title: Why AI gets it wrong
